name: Naive UI
description: A Vue 3 Component Library. Fairly Complete. Theme Customizable. Uses TypeScript. Fast.

description.value: A Vue 3 Component Library. Fairly Complete. Theme Customizable. Uses TypeScript. Fast.

styling-approach.comment: Uses CSS-in-JS approach; no CSS imports needed

component-model.comment: Provides ready-to-use components with built-in styling

typescript.comment: Written entirely in TypeScript with first-class type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Supports SSR with Nuxt, Vitepress, and Vite SSG/SSE; requires CSS-render >=0.15.14

design-system.comment: Custom design system with advanced type-safe theming

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark mode support via n-config-provider with darkTheme

theming-system.comment: Advanced type-safe theme system using TypeScript with theme-overrides

css-variables.comment: Uses JavaScript-based theme tokens via useThemeVars, not CSS variables

design-tokens.comment: TypeScript-based theme variables accessible via useThemeVars composable

rtl-support.comment: Experimental RTL support only for n-button, n-tag, n-page-header, n-card, n-radio, n-avatar, n-badge; tracking issue #97

component-count.comment: More than 90 components documented; all are tree-shakeable

text-input.comment: n-input component with password, email, search variants

textarea.comment: Multi-line text input with auto-resize support

combobox.comment: n-auto-complete and n-select with filterable option

slider.comment: n-slider with single and dual-thumb support

pin-input.comment: n-input-otp component added for OTP/PIN code input

color-picker.comment: n-color-picker component with full color picker UI

input-groups.comment: n-input-group for combining inputs with addons

input-with-dropdown.comment: Can combine n-input with n-dropdown or n-select

split-button.comment: No dedicated split button component; can be built with n-button-group and n-dropdown

data-table.comment: n-data-table with sorting, filtering, pagination; works with virtual list by default

virtual-infinite-list.comment: All data components (select, tree, transfer, table, cascader) work with virtual list; n-infinite-scroll component also available

tree-view.comment: n-tree component with hierarchical expandable structure

list-view.comment: n-list component with styled list items

tag-chip-pill.comment: n-tag component with closable and clickable options

timeline.comment: n-timeline for vertical timeline of events

calendar.comment: n-calendar for month/week calendar display view

toast-notification.comment: n-notification and n-message for temporary popup notifications

progress-circle.comment: n-progress with type='circle' for circular progress

skeleton.comment: n-skeleton for content placeholder during loading

drawer-sheet.comment: n-drawer slide-in panel from edge with scrollable content

popover.comment: n-popover for floating content anchored to trigger

dropdown-menu.comment: n-dropdown for action menus on click/hover

context-menu.comment: No dedicated context menu component; can be built using n-dropdown with @contextmenu event

stepper.comment: n-steps component for multi-step process indicator and navigation

navigation-menu.comment: n-menu for site navigation with dropdowns, supports vertical and horizontal modes

sidebar.comment: n-layout-sider for collapsible sidebar navigation with built-in scrollbar

bottom-navigation.comment: No dedicated bottom navigation component; can be built with n-layout and n-menu

stack.comment: No dedicated stack component; can use n-space for spacing or n-layout for flex-based layouts

container.comment: n-layout can be used as container; no dedicated max-width container component

splitter.comment: No dedicated splitter component for resizable split panes

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integrations documented

code-editors.comment: n-code component for syntax highlighting but no Monaco/CodeMirror integrations documented

chart-libraries.comment: No official chart library integrations documented

form-libraries.comment: Community integration example with vee-validate v4; no official form library bindings. Works with vuelidate via custom integration

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in transitions and animations; uses Vue 3 transition system

icon-libraries.comment: Officially recommends xicons which wraps multiple icon sets including FontAwesome, Lucide, Material Icons, etc.

date-libraries.comment: Built-in date handling; date-fns format support mentioned in issues but not officially documented

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow ARIA patterns based on component implementation; not explicitly documented but evident in component behavior

keyboard-navigation.comment: Interactive components support keyboard navigation; focus management in modals and dropdowns

screen-reader-tested.comment: No explicit documentation of screen reader testing in official docs or repository

focus-management.comment: Proper focus management in modals and dialogs; focus restoration implemented

accessibility-rating.comment: Adequate accessibility: ARIA-compliant components with keyboard navigation and focus management, but lacks explicit screen reader testing documentation and WCAG certification

bundle-size-full.comment: Package size is 36.1 MB on npm, but tree-shakeable; bundlephobia data not fully retrieved

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable library; actual bundle size depends on components imported; no core bundle specified

zero-runtime.comment: Uses CSS-in-JS with runtime style injection; requires @css-render for SSR

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be imported individually and loaded on demand; tree-shakeable architecture supports lazy loading

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with comprehensive API reference, code examples, and theming guides; interactive playground available; some gaps in advanced usage patterns

interactive-docs.comment: Live component playground in official docs; CodeSandbox examples available

storybook.comment: No official Storybook available; uses custom documentation site

figma-kit.comment: No official Figma design kit found

cli-generator.comment: No official CLI tool; community admin templates and scaffolds available but not official CLI generator

active-maintenance.comment: Latest release (v2.43.2) published November 2025; regular commits and releases

commercial-support.comment: Open-source MIT licensed project with community support; no commercial/enterprise support tier

style-override.comment: Supports class and style props; theme-overrides system using JavaScript theme tokens (not CSS variables but similar concept)

compound-components.comment: Uses composable sub-component pattern (e.g., n-form, n-form-item; n-layout, n-layout-sider)

render-props.comment: Supports render functions and Vue 3 slots for customization

slots.comment: Extensive use of Vue slots for content injection and customization

unstyled-mode.comment: Styled component library; no unstyled/headless mode available
